base_language_entries.notes: All extracted language entries were generated; hidden hardcoded/event text can still appear during public testing.

gameplay_ui_and_script_files.notes: Packaged script/UI files are synced with the working translated game folder; screenshot-driven polish is ongoing.

item_move_ability_effect_descriptions.notes: Names stay in English; descriptions/effects are translated where extracted or found in scripts.

nature_names.notes: Nature names are intentionally kept in the original English/default names.

options_config_screen.notes: Options/configuration screen text is kept as the game default in v1.1.4 to avoid script identifier/config crashes.

pokedex_ui_labels.notes: UI labels are in scope; species/fusion description entries are deferred.

coverage_snapshot.notes: Coverage is based on the extracted/packageable PT-BR scope. Pokedex species/fusion descriptions are intentionally excluded from the v1.1.4 payload and planned as future work.

excluded_from_release: Game binaries and original game assets
Updater folders and BAT files from the game installation
Recovery backups generated during translation work
Translation tool caches not required by the installer, except the text patch payload
Pokedex species/fusion description completion is deferred to a future project.

installer_sandbox_test.note: Direct invocation of the compiled GUI installer was blocked by the local execution sandbox, so v1.1.4 was validated by package/source checks: embedded payload, manifest, no active Pokedex payload, outfit patch presence, backup-capable installer source, and compiled resource list.

graphical_installer.embedded_payload: ptbr_payload.zip embedded; no active Pokedex entry mappings
graphical_installer.pokedex_behavior: skips Pokedex species/fusion descriptions in v1.1.4

known_issues.title: Official updater/save compatibility crash
known_issues.error: Script 'MultiSaves.rb' line 786: NoMethodError occurred. undefined method '[]' for nil:NilClass
known_issues.when: After running the official game updater .bat or restoring the game to an untranslated/original state before opening a save last used with the PT-BR translation.
known_issues.workaround: Reinstall/update the PT-BR translation with InfiniteFusionPTBRInstaller-v1.1.4.exe before opening the save again. If uninstalling the translation, use the graphical Desinstalar tradução button so the installer backs up saves, resets the saved language to English, restores the original pre-translation backup, and then recommends running the official game update .bat.
known_issues.save_file_editing_v112: graphical uninstall resets PokemonSystem.language to English after backing up save files

save_policy.installer_v112_edits_save_files: only during graphical uninstall, only PokemonSystem.language is reset to English
save_policy.after_official_update: Run the PT-BR installer again before opening a save.
save_policy.future_work: More advanced save repair may be added later; v1.1.4 backs up saves, resets language to English, and restores the original pre-translation backup during graphical uninstall.
